dc:title: i-Perception Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: vision science
perception
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A stratified random sample of 496 articles published in i-Perception between 2017 and 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. i-Perception is a fully open-access SAGE journal.

dc:provenance.sampling: 100 articles per year (target), stratified random sample, seed 20260620, reduced in later years by an unresolved intermittent API failure
dc:provenance.pdf_source: journals.sagepub.com direct download (with Sec-CH-UA Client Hints headers to avoid a Cloudflare challenge) and Europe PMC for a subset
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-21)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 4 non-article notices dropped, 115 duplicate-DOI bookkeeping rows resolved, 6 garbled DOIs corrected, 2 missing titles backfilled from CrossRef, 9 PDFs permanently excluded after failing GROBID conversion twice (8 oversized, 1 malformed)
